parameters.query:
SELECT
  cs.schedule_id, cs.contract_id, cs.schedule_type, cs.schedule_label,
  cs.extracted_text, cs.summary,
  uc.contract_type_key, uc.contract_name
FROM contract_schedules cs
JOIN uploaded_contracts uc ON uc.contract_id = cs.contract_id
WHERE cs.schedule_id = $1::uuid
  AND cs.contract_id = $2::uuid;

SELECT template_item_id, check_question, check_category, importance_level, display_order
FROM schedule_checklist_templates
WHERE contract_type_key = $1
  AND schedule_type = $2
  AND is_active = TRUE
ORDER BY display_order ASC;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, contractId: $json.contractId || $('Prepare Checklist Prompt').first().json.contractId, scheduleId: $json.scheduleId || $('Prepare Checklist Prompt').first().json.scheduleId, resultsCount: ($json.checklistResults || $('Process Checklist Response').first().json.checklistResults || []).length, checklistScore: $json.checklistScore !== undefined ? $json.checklistScore : ($('Process Checklist Response').first().json.checklistScore || null) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: $json.error?.message || $json.message || 'Schedule checklist check failed' }) }}
